hypothesis: If SFT-trained language models for BCC/B2 alloy design are further optimized with Direct Preference Optimization using Thermo-Calc–derived hierarchical rewards, then the DPO models will generate compositions with higher mean reward, greater compositional validity and novelty, improved coverage of desirable alloy space, and higher unique useful candidate rates than the SFT models and other baselines without incurring harmful distribution shift.
